if.test: params.deptCd != null and params.deptCd != '' and params.deptCd != 'ALL'
params.posCd != null and params.posCd != '' and params.posCd != 'ALL'
params.deptRoleCd != null and params.deptRoleCd != '' and params.deptRoleCd != 'ALL'
params.posRoleCd != null and params.posRoleCd != '' and params.posRoleCd != 'ALL'
params.roleCd != null and params.roleCd != '' and params.roleCd != 'ALL'
params.acntActYn != null and params.acntActYn != '' and params.acntActYn != 'ALL'

mapper.sql: E.EMP_NO AS empNo, E.EMP_NM AS empNm, E.DEPT_CD AS deptCd, D.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, E.POS_CD AS posCd, P.POS_NM AS posNm, E.ACNT_ACT_YN AS acntActYn, CASE WHEN E.ACNT_ACT_YN = 'Y' THEN '활성' ELSE '비활성' END AS acntActNm, E.EMP_STAT_CD AS empStatCd, ( SELECT role_cd FROM ( SELECT ER.ROLE_CD AS role_cd FROM EMP_ROLE ER WHERE ER.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO AND ER.ROLE_CD IN ('ROLE_HR', 'ROLE_USER') ORDER BY CASE ER.ROLE_CD WHEN 'ROLE_HR' THEN 1 WHEN 'ROLE_USER' THEN 2 ELSE 99 END ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS deptRoleCd, ( SELECT role_nm FROM ( SELECT RM.ROLE_NM AS role_nm FROM EMP_ROLE ER JOIN ROLE_MST RM ON RM.ROLE_CD = ER.ROLE_CD WHERE ER.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO AND ER.ROLE_CD IN ('ROLE_HR', 'ROLE_USER') ORDER BY CASE ER.ROLE_CD WHEN 'ROLE_HR' THEN 1 WHEN 'ROLE_USER' THEN 2 ELSE 99 END ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS deptRoleNm, ( SELECT role_cd FROM ( SELECT ER.ROLE_CD AS role_cd FROM EMP_ROLE ER WHERE ER.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO AND ER.ROLE_CD IN ('ROLE_LEADER', 'ROLE_EMP') ORDER BY CASE ER.ROLE_CD WHEN 'ROLE_LEADER' THEN 1 WHEN 'ROLE_EMP' THEN 2 ELSE 99 END ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS posRoleCd, ( SELECT role_nm FROM ( SELECT RM.ROLE_NM AS role_nm FROM EMP_ROLE ER JOIN ROLE_MST RM ON RM.ROLE_CD = ER.ROLE_CD WHERE ER.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO AND ER.ROLE_CD IN ('ROLE_LEADER', 'ROLE_EMP') ORDER BY CASE ER.ROLE_CD WHEN 'ROLE_LEADER' THEN 1 WHEN 'ROLE_EMP' THEN 2 ELSE 99 END ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS posRoleNm, ( SELECT LISTAGG(ER.ROLE_CD, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ER.ROLE_CD) FROM EMP_ROLE ER WHERE ER.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO ) AS roleCds
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP E LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST P ON E.POS_CD = P.POS_CD
SELECT ROLE_CD AS roleCd, ROLE_NM AS roleNm, ROLE_DESC AS roleDesc, USE_YN AS useYn FROM ROLE_MST ORDER BY CASE WHEN USE_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, ROLE_CD
SELECT ROLE_CD AS roleCd, ROLE_NM AS roleNm, ROLE_DESC AS roleDesc, USE_YN AS useYn FROM ROLE_MST WHERE ROLE_CD = #{roleCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ROLE_MST ( ROLE_CD, ROLE_NM, ROLE_DESC, USE_YN, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM ) VALUES ( #{roleCd}, #{roleNm}, #{roleDesc}, #{useYn}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE ROLE_MST SET ROLE_NM = #{roleNm}, ROLE_DESC = #{roleDesc}, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE ROLE_CD = #{roleCd}
mapper.select: SELECT PARENT_ROLE_CD AS parentRoleCd, CHILD_ROLE_CD AS childRoleCd, REG_DTM AS regDtm, MOD_DTM AS modDtm FROM ROLE_HIERARCHY ORDER BY PARENT_ROLE_CD, CHILD_ROLE_CD
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO ROLE_HIERARCHY ( PARENT_ROLE_CD, CHILD_ROLE_CD, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM ) VALUES ( #{e.parentRoleCd}, #{e.childRoleCd}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
